llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING:
The AI assistant’s final coverage plan lists five distinct plans: (1) Optimized Executive Portfolio – Health, (2) Optimized Executive Portfolio – Property, (3) Optimized Executive Portfolio – Travel, (4) EliteCare Premium Plan0 (Executive Liability Protection Suite), and (5) Executive Concierge & Wellness Add-on. To map these to the ground-truth ratings, we must find the closest corresponding entries:

1. 'Optimized Executive Portfolio – Health' covers both physical and mental health, preventive care, psychiatry, and telemedicine. The most equivalent in the ground-truth data is EliteCare Premium Plan or PrimeCare Premium Plan (both rated 10). Since it includes all executive-tier and mental health coverage, it aligns with the top-tier health options.

2. 'Optimized Executive Portfolio – Property' covers high-value home, contents, luxury items, art, electronics, and business equipment. The best match is EliteHome Premium Coverage (rating 10), the highest-rated premium property protection for executives.

3. 'Optimized Executive Portfolio – Travel' includes global business and family travel, medical evacuation, and 24/7 coordination. This matches either PrimeTravel Premium Plan or EliteTravel Premium Plan, both rated 10.

4. 'EliteCare Premium Plan0 (Executive Liability Protection Suite)' corresponds to the EliteCare Premium Plan family (rating 10) offering executive-level professional liability coverage.

5. 'Executive Concierge & Wellness Add-on' integrates concierge services, wellness programs, and telemedicine. Wellness Programs in the health_enhancement_services section have a rating of 10, making this add-on equivalent in quality.

Thus, all components correspond to top-tier (rating 10) offerings in the ground-truth data.
